overview.description: Oracle Repeat with localized variations and times
overview.name: Oracle Repeat Test

oracle.comment: Create table for repeat variations test
oracle.query: CREATE TABLE repeat_news ( id NUMBER(10) PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR2(100) )

oracle.comment: Insert static data for the loop to read
oracle.query: INSERT ALL INTO repeat_news (id, title) VALUES (10, 'Global Tech Update') INTO repeat_news (id, title) VALUES (20, 'Local Sports Events') INTO repeat_news (id, title) VALUES (30, 'Weather Forecast 2026') SELECT * FROM dual

oracle.comment: Check ability to get specific news inside repeat loop
oracle.query: SELECT id AS "id", title AS "title" FROM repeat_news WHERE id = {{id}}

oracle.comment: Create append-only table for repeat test
oracle.query: CREATE TABLE repeat_simple_log ( run_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, message VARCHAR2(50) )

repeat.comment: Run the insert query exactly 5 times

oracle.comment: Insert a log entry on each iteration
oracle.query: INSERT INTO repeat_simple_log (message) VALUES ('Loop iteration executed')

oracle.comment: Verify exactly 5 rows were inserted by the loop
Drop both tables to clean up environment
